arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna - Champions League: Live score, team news and updates as Arne Slot's side look to build on win over AC Milan in opening matchday plus the latest from Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of the Champions League ties of Liverpool vs Bologna and Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich as both Premier League sides look to build on opening matchday wins.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna LIVE: Champions League team news, line-ups and more tonight
arts.sum: Arne Slot’s side look to build on their impressive 3-1 win over AC Milan at the San Siro in their European opener

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna LIVE! Champions League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Arne Slot takes charge of first home European game as Reds boss

arts.ttl: Romano's 'difficult' response to BIZARRE Darwin Nunez rumour
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has rubbished the bizarre rumour that Atletico Madrid could sign Darwin Nunez from Liverpool . The fact that Slot does not appear to be his biggest fan has given rise to a bizarre rumour that Liverpool were planning to offload Nunez and potentially replace him with Real Madrid winger Rodrygo .

arts.ttl: Why Federico Chiesa is not in Liverpool squad for Champions League clash vs Bologna
arts.sum: Liverpool host Bologna in the Champions League on Wednesday evening and Federico Chiesa will not be involved after suffering an injury setback

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Arne Slot is "no Klopp tribute act" despite "phenomenal start" to reign
arts.sum: Liverpool expert David Lynch talks to Sports Mole about how Arne Slot has helped the club to avoid an immediate slump following the departure of Jurgen Klopp.

arts.ttl: Martin Zubimendi opens up on decision to reject summer move to Liverpool
arts.sum: One of the biggest Spanish football transfer stories of the summer involved Martin Zubimendi. The Real Sociedad pivot was heavily linked with a move to Liverpool, and at one stage, it seemed certain that he would join the Premier League giants. However, he ended up showing loyalty to La Real once again, and he stayed […] The post Martin Zubimendi opens up on decision to reject summer move to Liverpool appeared first on Football España.

Liverpool summer signing makes mark as 17-year-old nets winner in Europe
arts.sum: Amara Nallo was the matchwinner in Liverpool's UEFA Youth League clash against Bologna at Kirkby on Wednesday afternoon
